dataset: Homo sapiens insulin (INS), transcript variant 1, mRNA (NM_000207)
privileged_info_summary: The input file human_insulin_gene.gb is a real 465 bp GenBank record (Homo sapiens insulin transcript variant 1, NM_000207). The task requires the agent to find inverted repeats of length 8 or greater and export them to a GFF file and summarize them. A Python analysis confirms at least 6 candidate inverted repeat pairs of length 8+ exist in the sequence (e.g. CCCTCCAG/CTGGAGGG). The verifier dynamically checks for self-consistency (that the summary file correctly reflects the feature count and first feature coordinates present in the GFF file) rather than hardcoding the expected biological ground truth.
